command:
BACKUP_DIR=/home/jose/agent-backups-$(date +%Y%m%d)
mkdir -p $BACKUP_DIR

echo "=== Backing up Sakura (vm-hermes) ==="
# Copy hermes config, soul, service file from vm-hermes to vm-claude-hub
ssh -i /home/jose/.ssh/n8n_bridge -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no jose@192.168.0.202 \
  "tar czf /tmp/sakura-backup.tar.gz -C /home/jose/.hermes config.yaml SOUL.md .env 2>/dev/null; sudo cp /etc/systemd/system/hermes-gateway.service /tmp/ 2>/dev/null; sudo chmod 644 /tmp/hermes-gateway.service; tar czf /tmp/sakura-full.tar.gz -C /home/jose/.hermes config.yaml SOUL.md .env -C /tmp hermes-gateway.service 2>/dev/null; echo done"
scp -i /home/jose/.ssh/n8n_bridge -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no jose@192.168.0.202:/tmp/sakura-full.tar.gz $BACKUP_DIR/ 2>/dev/null
echo "Sakura backup: $(ls -la $BACKUP_DIR/sakura-full.tar.gz 2>/dev/null | awk '{print $5}') bytes"

echo "=== Backing up Remy (vm-openclaw) ==="
ssh -i /home/jose/.ssh/n8n_bridge -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no jose@192.168.0.199 \
  "tar czf /tmp/remy-backup.tar.gz -C /home/jose/.openclaw openclaw.json openclaw.json.last-good gateway.systemd.env workspace/SOUL.md 2>/dev/null; echo done"
scp -i /home/jose/.ssh/n8n_bridge -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no jose@192.168.0.199:/tmp/remy-backup.tar.gz $BACKUP_DIR/ 2>/dev/null
echo "Remy backup: $(ls -la $BACKUP_DIR/remy-backup.tar.gz 2>/dev/null | awk '{print $5}') bytes"

echo "=== Copying to Nextcloud ==="
# Copy backup dir into the mounted Nextcloud
if [ -d /mnt/nextcloud ]; then
  mkdir -p /mnt/nextcloud/AgentBackups
  cp -r $BACKUP_DIR /mnt/nextcloud/AgentBackups/ 2>/dev/null && echo "Copied to /mnt/nextcloud/AgentBackups/"
  ls -la /mnt/nextcloud/AgentBackups/
else
  echo "Nextcloud not mounted at /mnt/nextcloud"
fi

echo "=== Backup contents ==="
ls -la $BACKUP_DIR/
